title: Nursery Rhyme. CXCI. Riddles.
content:
Ten and ten and twice eleven,
        Take out six and put in seven;
        Go to the green and fetch eighteen,
        And drop one a coming.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. CXCI. Riddles." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
